title: Blazing Six Shooters
actors: Charles Starrett, Iris Meredith, Dick Curtis
plot: Karsin and Lash are after the Kenyon and Rawlins ranches where they have spotted silver ore. When Lash robs Rawlins and kills Kenyon, Jeff suspects them and makes a plan to nab the two. He sells the ranch to Karsin and as suspecte...
